caption:
More details ⤵️

📍 Onda by Pierchic, Jumeirah Al Qasr
🕔 Opens at 5 PM
🍹 We had mocktails at 45 AED each and truffle fries at 40 AED. Signature cocktails, wine, and other light bites are available. No minimum spend. (Info as of October 2024.)

This is the best lounge I’ve been to in Dubai!  Onda is perched over water, in a wooden pier connected to Dubai’s most romantic restaurant ~ @pierchicdubai. It’s a great spot to watch the sunset and gaze at Burj Al Arab while having a pre-dinner drink. 

Who will you bring here? 
Tag them in the comments.
